column1: #     Column Definitions:
#     - Total Potential Responses: All survey participants including those who left the question blank.
#     - Non-empty Responses: The number of survey participants from that institution who provided any kind of answer to the question, including both informative and non-informative responses.
#     - Informative Responses: Responses that are not classified as non-informative (e.g.  not "N/A"  "No comment" etc.).
